This video is sponsored by Scribe and may include affiliate links. This means that if you sign up or make a purchase through the links, I may earn a small commission at no additional cost to you.

89% of executives say AI makes them more productive… but the reality? Most are only saving 16 minutes per week.

Why? Because they’re using AI like a tool, not like an operating system.

In this video, you’ll learn how to become an AI-powered CEO by rebuilding your workflow, eliminating bottlenecks, and leveraging AI agents to reclaim hours every week — not just minutes.

If you’re still stuck in meetings, emails, and repetitive tasks… you’re not leading — you’re operating like a high-paid intern.

This is your wake-up call.

AI only creates leverage when it’s applied with strategy, systems, and execution.
If you’re serious about using AI to build or scale a real business (not just experiment with tools), this video is part of a much bigger ecosystem.

👉 Build an AI-first business here: https://aifoundershq.com

At AI Founders HQ, you’ll find:
• Practical AI business education
• Free + paid founder communities
• Real frameworks for turning AI into leverage
